title: AmendmentEffectiveDateEnum
description: The enumerated values to specify the effective date of the Amendment to Termination Currency when specified as a specific date (e.g. the annex date).

oneOf.title: AgreementDate
oneOf.description: The effective date corresponds to the Agreement date.

oneOf.title: AmendmentEffectiveDate
oneOf.description: The effective date corresponds to the Amendment Effective Date (IM).

oneOf.title: AnnexDate
oneOf.description: The effective date corresponds to the Annex date.

oneOf.title: DeedDate
oneOf.description: The effective date corresponds to the Deed date.
